title: Greek Yogurt Crumble Tadka
description: A unique Indian-inspired dessert combining the flavors of Greek yogurt, tadka spices, and a crunchy oat crumble.
instructions: In a medium bowl, whisk together the flour, sugar, and tadka spice mix.
Add the unsalted butter to the dry ingredients and mix until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
Press half of the mixture into the bottom of a 9x9-inch baking dish.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the Greek yogurt and a pinch of salt.
Pour the yogurt mixture over the crust.
Top with the remaining crumb mixture.
Bake for 35-40 minutes or until the topping is golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 10 minutes.
Serve warm or at room temperature.
